articles.author: Kelly Hooper
articles.title: Republicans see high-risk plans as the future of health insurance - Politico
articles.description: More than 40 million Americans are already opting to take on the cost of sick visits, drugs and surgeries to get lower premiums and tax savings.
articles.content: Theres a catch: The cheaper plans dont cover the first several thousand dollars in sick visits, drugs and surgeries a patient needs. Nearly 4 in 10 Obamacare enrollees are in these high-deductible pl… [+11629 chars]
